questionHtml:
The diagram shows some of the metabolic processes taking place in a plant cell.

State the type of reaction which converts excess monosaccharides to polysaccharides.

meta.title: State the type of reaction which converts excess monosaccharides to polysaccharides.
breadcrumbLabels: B1.1.2. Production of macromolecules by condensation reactions that link monomers to form a polymer
